content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian, they were arranged to conduct the test.

The so-called test is to test the real strength.

For example, the body composite index, the will composite index, and the other side composite index.

Among them, the composite index of the other side is related to the golden text of the other side, the black text of the other side, and the magic of the other side.

The higher the index, the more powerful the owner will be.

If the indices are rubbish, I am afraid that they will only be recruited by those new island owners, and the treatment given is naturally very average, only basic treatment.

First of all, the thirty-six other level geniuses tested the comprehensive index of the body.

In the midst of a majestic temple.

One by one, the other side level geniuses walked in.

And secretly, one by one the island owners are secretly observing.

At the same time, they were chatting.

"Bai Du, are there any good seedlings this time?"

"There is a good seedling, but the specific situation will be clear later. "

"Oh, Bai Du's vision is very high, it is definitely not easy to be called a good seedling by you!"

"I don't know if there is a comprehensive index of the three doors of this good seedling, if there is more than 1,000, then it is a good seedling!"

"It is very difficult for the comprehensive index to break 1,000, as long as it is not less than 100!"

"In the last session, there were several other shore-level geniuses with a comprehensive index below 100, but there was no way, we could only recruit other shore-level geniuses in the east or cultivate them internally. But internal cultivation is also more difficult, there are too many creatures in the east, so that a genius can be born on the other side, the number of creatures controlled by our Fengya Island is too small, and internal cultivation can only be accumulated with resources, and that kind of genius on the other side is too wasteful. "

"It would be nice if I could intervene in the middle of the hand, but the middle part can often give birth to more demonic geniuses on the other side!"

"Forget it, the water in the middle is too deep for us to interfere with. "

"I think this time, I'm afraid there are a lot of other world-level geniuses with a composite index below 100. After all, this time to recruit a genius from the other side is not too far from the last time!"

"There's no way, Wind Tooth Island has lost a lot of other shore-level geniuses over the years, and we have to replenish some other-level geniuses!"

While these island owners were discussing, Ye Tian and their physical tests began.

......

In a special void.

Ye Tian felt that his body could no longer be controlled, and a strange power poured into his body.

And then.

His physical condition was revealed.

The heart of the other side, the golden blood of the other side, and the golden bones of the other side could not be concealed one by one, and the complete golden body of Xuanyang on the other side was also completely exposed.

Moreover, physical potential, all kinds of influences will be detected.

Soon.

The test is over.

Then, he stepped out of the void.

The other thirty-five other shore-level geniuses also came out, all very nervous.

At the moment, they don't know what their body composite index is, but they definitely want it higher.

And those island owners naturally knew the comprehensive index of the bodies of the thirty-six other shore-level geniuses for the first time.

"The Endless Lord's body composite index is over 1000!"

The Lord of the White Capital was shocked.

"Endless Lord, is this the other shore-level genius you value?" the other island lords were surprised.

"The eighth-time bone transformation realm is a genius on the other side, the cultivation is so low, but the comprehensive index of the body is so high, you must know that the eighth bone transformation realm is weaker than the ninth bone transformation realm, after all, the strength of the physical body is not enough, and the evaluation will be lower. And he was able to exceed the 1000 composite index because he had cultivated a complete golden body on the other side, and it was the most complete golden body on the other side, and he successfully broke through the method of the complete golden body on the other side. Moreover, his physical potential is very high, which will only exceed the thousand index. "

"This other shore-level genius is indeed very good, although we can also cultivate such a shore-level genius on Fengya Island, but he relies on himself, which is very demonic. This little one, I want it!"

"I want it too, don't rob me, my Black Cloud Island only has thirteen other shore-level geniuses, you just let me!"

"Hehe, Lord of the Black Cloud, let it be given to you, wouldn't it delay other people's cultivation?"

At this time, the lord of the white capital said: "Don't quarrel, let's wait for the three composite index tests to end and then discuss." And when the time comes, the composite index will be reported to all the island owners, and some of the island owners have not yet come, so they may also compete!"

In this way, these island owners did not continue to fight.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the White Capital walked out and began to announce the body composite index of the thirty-six other shore-level geniuses.

The comprehensive body index of one after another other level geniuses was announced, and some other side level geniuses had a body comprehensive index of three or four hundred, while others were very average, only one or two hundred, or even only a few dozen.

And this kind of other-level genius with only a few dozen body comprehensive indices is completely piled up with resources and time.

This kind of other-level genius is naturally not popular.

"The Lord of Hiiragi, the body comprehensive index is 128!"

The Lord of the White Capital announced.

As soon as he heard the number 128, the Lord of Hiiragi was a little disappointed, but fortunately, it was not less than 100, and there were two geniuses at the other side who were obviously not weak, but their physical comprehensive index was only more than 90, which was very embarrassing.

The last one read Ye Tian.

"Endless Lord, Body Composite Index 1068!"

The Lord of the White Capital announced.

Then.

Many other level geniuses looked at Ye Tian one after another, revealing expressions of disbelief.

The body composite index is 1068, which is much higher than them, and it is simply not a grade.

"The Endless Lord's Body Composite Index is so high!!"

The Lord of Tiandu looked at Ye Tian.

At the beginning, in the other side level genius competition, he easily defeated Ye Tian.

Unexpectedly, now, Ye Tian's comprehensive body index far surpassed him.

He has some knowledge of the body composite index of Fengya Island, and it is very perverted to have a body comprehensive index of more than 1000.

He is only more than 600 body comprehensive index, which is very far from 1000.

All of a sudden, he was struck.

"Now let's take the will test!"

The Lord of the White Capital announced.

The comprehensive test of will is relatively simple, which is to look at the strength and potential of will.

Will also has potential, but it is difficult to detect, but Wind Tooth Island can test it.

Of course, the strength of the will is a large percentage.

If the will reaches the will of the Origin Realm, then the composite index will be very high.

Soon, one by one, the other side level geniuses went to another place to take the will comprehensive index test.

And Ye Tian also entered another hall for testing, and soon the test results came out.
